rulings.Case Title: BARBARA FEDUN VS. RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 8, 2017 line 1. RESPONDENT RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION's DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION Continued to August 24, 2017. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than August 11, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: UNITED FAMILY CARE CORP. VS. DENNIS THIELE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn In Support Of Mtn To Quash And Recall Writ Of Execution For Possession
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 8, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT DENNIS THIELE's Motion To Quash And Recall Writ Of Execution For Possession GRANTED. The writ of possession was issued upon a judgment terminating prior tenancy. New tenancy was created by operation of law per CC 1954 upon Plaintiff's acceptance of June/July 2017 rent. This tenancy has to be separately terminated prior to Plaintiff re-taking possession.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ELLIS STREET STUDIOS, LLC VS. MICHELLE HOPKINS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 8, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT MICHELLE HOPKINS MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MELI BROWN VS. ANGELA ARMSTRONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion; Motion To Vacate Default An Default Judgment And Recall Writ; Declaration; Exhibits
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 8, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT ANGELA ARMSTRONG's Motion To Vacate Default An Default Judgment And Recall Writ; Declaration; Exhibits GRANTED, subject to (1) by no later than August 8, 2017 Defendant shall post $7,756 with the Court; and (2) by no later than August 8, 2017 Defendant shall file and serve her answer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 10 HAWTHORNE STREET, LLC VS. JOHN BERGGRUEN GALLERY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant To Strike Portion Of Unlawful Detainer Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 8, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT JOHN BERGGRUEN GALLERY's Motion To Strike Portions Of Unlawful Detainer Complaint GRANTED with leave to amend. Under section 21 of the lease Notice pursuant to this section "shall constitute those [notices] required under CCP 1161 et seq." As stated in Landlord-Tenant Practice Guide 7:147.1 in cases other than for non-payment of rent, "a forfeiture (though not expressly stated) is implicit in the landlord's § 1161 notice that simply states the tenant's right of possession is terminated." Plaintiff shall have 5 days to amend to allege in good faith that the operative "30 Day Notice to Cure Violations of Lease" states that the tenant's right of possession is terminated.= (501/REQ)
